day name: Feast of the Most Holy Eucharist
specialDismissal: Who, in His abounding goodness gave us His Body to eat and His true Blood to drink for our salvation,
troparia: (Tone 4) Your memorial, O Christ our God,* has shone forth upon the world as a festal day,* for the fishermen learned from You to offer unbloody sacrifice with bread and wine.* And so, we celebrate Your divine memorial,* and doing so cry out, O Lord, glory be to You!
kontakia: (Tone 4) Behold Christ is present as food for all.* Come, let us fall down and worship Christ our God* hidden under these Mysteries and humbly cry out:* Consume us not by fire through communion, O Master, unworthy as we are,* but be the One who consumes our sins by fire* and purifies our souls.
